section2/.gitignore.general_idea: Add IntelliJ IDEA configuration files to .gitignore to prevent committing local IDE settings.

section2/cards/.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore Maven wrapper scripts, help documentation, and Git attributes to keep the repository clean.

section2/loans/.gitignore.general_idea: Add .gitattributes to gitignore to prevent tracking of line-ending or attribute configuration files.
Add HELP.md to gitignore to exclude auto-generated help documentation from version control.
Add mvnw to gitignore to exclude the Unix Maven wrapper script from version control.
Add mvnw.cmd to gitignore to exclude the Windows Maven wrapper script from version control.
Add maven-wrapper.properties to gitignore to exclude the Maven wrapper configuration from version control.
